data.title: Hong Kong Ethereum Collateralized ETF is about to be listed, and new crypto regulatory rules will promote the construction of digital hubs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) passed the new regulations to "allow licensed institutions to provide pledge services", the Ethereum pledge ETF jointly launched by China Asset Management (Hong Kong) and OSL Digital Securities was approved and will be listed on May 15 at the latest. The Ethereum pledge ETF is separated from the custody of the licensed platform OSL and the node verification of the French pledge service provider Kiln, and investors can indirectly obtain Ethereum pledge income. The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) released the "ASPIRe" roadmap last month, which clearly proposed five pillars - access, safeguards, products, infrastructure and collaborations, with the goal of building a complete virtual asset ecosystem. Hong Kong's first Ethereum pledge ETF is scheduled to be launched on April 25. The Hong Kong government has approved two pledged crypto ETFs in a row within three months, and the regulatory framework is gradually becoming internationally competitive. (Decrypt)

data.title: BitMart will launch Manipulated Time (TIME)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Manipulated Time (TIME) at 16:00 (Eastern Time) on April 17, and the TIME/USDT trading pair will be opened.
It is reported that Manipulated Time (TIME) is the first token on Raydium LaunchLab, launched using the cook meme.

data.title: Tariff Threats Impact Southeast Asia's Bitcoin Mining Equipment Exports
data.description:
According to PANews, Southeast Asian Bitcoin mining equipment companies faced a critical deadline of midnight on April 9. Christopher Beshore, president of Canadian freight forwarding company Sealion Cargo, described the period as unforgettable due to U.S. President Donald Trump's unexpected announcement of reciprocal tariffs. The tariffs imposed were 36% on Thailand, 32% on Indonesia, and 24% on Malaysia, countries that have become central to the assembly and distribution of cryptocurrency mining machines.

The U.S. buyers of these mining machines faced significant financial challenges unless Beshore and his team could ship the equipment before the tariffs took effect. In response, Sealion chartered five planes and coordinated dozens of trucks and barges to transport $330 million worth of equipment from the three Southeast Asian countries to the United States. Beshore noted that the potential tariff risk exceeded $80 million.

The tariff threat posed a particular challenge to cryptocurrency mining, as few U.S.-made machines can perform the high-performance computing required to profit in the competitive industry.

data.title: Bhutan plans to develop green mining, investing in cryptocurrencies has made "millions of dollars"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bhutan has made millions of dollars in profits through cryptocurrency investment, enough to pay two years' salary for government employees. Bhutan's sovereign wealth fund Druk Holding and Investments has included cryptocurrencies in its investment portfolio since 2019. The fund's CEO Ujjwal Deep Dahal revealed that Bhutan will use its abundant hydropower resources to develop green cryptocurrency mining in the future and gradually phase out fossil fuel mining of digital currencies. (Reuters)

data.title: Data: Stablecoin transaction volume will exceed Visa payment volume for the first time in 2024
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Cointelegraph, stablecoin transaction volume exceeded Visa's payment volume for the first time in 2024.

data.title: A whale sold 4 million FARTCOIN in exchange for 3.5 million USDC in the past 4 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, in the past 4 hours, a giant whale sold 4 million FARTCOIN at an average price of $0.876 in exchange for 3.5 million USDC. The wallet still holds 1 million FARTCOIN, worth $905,000.

data.title: Dogecoin Price Holds Support After False Breakout: Potential Bull Run?
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) has held above a crucial support zone after an earlier false breakdown, which may signal a potential bullish trend. The market demonstrated purchase demand after reverting from its previous state. Dogecoin price movement and technical analysis indicators signal that it could anticipate another bullish trend
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/17/dogecoin-price-holds-support-after-false-breakout-potential-bull-run/

data.title: Could SEC-Ripple appeals pause trigger 27% breakout in XRP price?
data.description:
Ripple (XRP) stabilized above $2. 00, exemplifying a similar pattern to the largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, Bitcoin (BTC), which holds firmly above $84,000 at the time of writing on Thursday.
source: https://www.fxstreet.com/cryptocurrencies/news/xrp-chart-signals-27-jump-after-sec-ripple-appeals-pause-and-50-million-settlement-202504170530

data.title: Ave.ai completes omnichannel deployment and officially releases iOS professional version app
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Blockchain data platform Ave.ai announced that its flagship product "Ave Pro" iOS version has officially landed on the US and Australian app stores and TestFlight test platform. This release marks the completion of the platform's full-channel product matrix for PC, mobile dual-end (iOS/Android), Telegram Bot and H5.
As a decentralized on-chain trading platform that supports 130+ public chains, Ave Pro iOS version continues the professional-level K-line analysis function of the web side, with a clearer page and more convenient transaction operation links.
The product manager of Ave.ai said: "We have always regarded the iOS version update and launch as an important layout of the global market strategy. User demand has always been the guide for Ave product iteration. I believe that users can see our efforts and sincerity in the process of using iOS products."

data.title: Gate.io Releases Limited Edition F1 Commemorative Gift Box for Its 12th Anniversary
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: To celebrate the 12th anniversary of the platform, the crypto asset trading platform Gate.io officially launched the "12th Anniversary Limited Edition Commemorative Gift Box". As the sponsor of the F1 Red Bull team, this gift box is a F1 Red Bull co-branded racing car model, which is a limited gift for global partners and guests at the Dubai event to express gratitude for long-term support and companionship, and convey the brand spirit of "12 years of walking together, opening the door together, and moving forward with a new look". It highlights the brand's cross-border innovation concept and international vision, and also reflects Gate.io's high attention to the global ecological cooperation network.
